name: ynab-mcp-server
description: YNAB MCP connector for budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, accounts, months, payees, and budget review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude and Codex to YNAB budgets and transactions.
interface.longDescription: A standalone YNAB MCP connector that gives Claude and Codex access to budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, accounts, months, and payees. Requires YNAB_API_TOKEN unless using the server's YNAB_OP_PATH fallback.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my YNAB budget this month.
